title: Proportionate planning
summary: Produce the smallest implementation-ready plan that maps every requirement to a testable acceptance criterion.
instructions: Map every approved user story and requirement to at least one testable acceptance criterion.
Specify components, likely files, interfaces, data and state changes, risks, and validation methods so implementation needs no further architectural decisions.
Prefer existing abstractions and reversible changes; justify any new structure, framework, or governance layer against the current requirement.
